title: clerodendrum griffithianum
intro: Clerodendrum griffithianum, also known as the benghal torch or blue glorybower, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to India and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its potential health benefits including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In traditional medicine, Clerodendrum griffithianum is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to make herbal remedies for various ailments.
